diffs.diff:
--- a/debug_eval.py
+++ b/debug_eval.py
@@ -0,0 +1,131 @@
+import os

+import json

+import torch

+from transformers import AutoProcessor, Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration

+from peft import PeftModel

+from PIL import Image

+

+def main():

+    base_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

+    base_model_id = os.path.join(base_dir, "base_model")

+    

+    processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained(

+        base_model_id,

+        min_pixels=256*28*28, 

+        max_pixels=512*28*28,

+        trust_remote_code=True

+    )

+    

+    print("Vocab check:")

+    vocab = processor.tokenizer.get_vocab()

+    for token in ["<box>", "</box>", "<|box_start|>", "<|box_end|>", "<point>", "</point>", "<|point_start|>", "<|point_end|>"]:

+        if token in vocab:

+            print(f"Token {token} is in vocab with ID {vocab[token]}")

+        else:

+            print(f"Token {token} NOT in vocab")

+            

+    device = "cuda:0"

+    model = Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained(

+        base_model_id,

+        torch_dtype=torch.bfloat16,

+        device_map=device

+    )

+    

+    print("\n=== Base Model Grounding Test ===")

+    with open("/data/unified_val.jsonl", "r") as f:

+        item = json.loads(f.readline())

+        image = Image.open(os.path.join("/data", item["image_path"])).convert("RGB")

+        instruction = item["instruction"]

+        

+        messages = [

+            {

+                "role": "user",

+                "content": [

+                    {"type": "image"},

+                    {"type": "text", "text": f"Find the UI element: {instruction}. Output its bounding box."}

+                ]

+            }

+        ]

+        

+        text = processor.apply_chat_template(messages, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)

+        inputs = processor(text=[text], images=[image], return_tensors="pt").to(device)

+        

+        with torch.no_grad():

+            generated_ids = model.generate(**inputs, max_new_tokens=50)

+            

+        generated_ids_trimmed = [

+            out_ids[len(in_ids):] for in_ids, out_ids in zip(inputs.input_ids, generated_ids)

+        ]

+        output_text = processor.batch_decode(

+            generated_ids_trimmed, skip_special_tokens=False, clean_up_tokenization_spaces=False

+        )[0]

+        print("Instruction:", instruction)

+        print("Base model output:", output_text)

+        

+    print("\n=== Fine-tuned Model Test ===")

+    model = PeftModel.from_pretrained(model, "checkpoints/baseline")

+    model.eval()

+    

+    with open("/data/unified_val.jsonl", "r") as f:

+        for _ in range(3):

+            item = json.loads(f.readline())

+            image = Image.open(os.path.join("/data", item["image_path"])).convert("RGB")

+            instruction = item["instruction"]

+            

+            messages = [

+                {

+                    "role": "user",

+                    "content": [

+                        {"type": "image"},

+                        {"type": "text", "text": f"Find the UI element: {instruction}"}

+                    ]

+                }

+            ]

+            

+            text = processor.apply_chat_template(messages, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)

+            inputs = processor(text=[text], images=[image], return_tensors="pt").to(device)

+            

+            with torch.no_grad():

+                generated_ids = model.generate(**inputs, max_new_tokens=50)

+                

+            generated_ids_trimmed = [

+                out_ids[len(in_ids):] for in_ids, out_ids in zip(inputs.input_ids, generated_ids)

+            ]

+            output_text = processor.batch_decode(

+                generated_ids_trimmed, skip_special_tokens=False, clean_up_tokenization_spaces=False

+            )[0]

+            

+            print("-" * 50)

+            print("Instruction:", instruction)

+            print("Fine-tuned output:", output_text)

+

+    print("\n=== Tokenization Check ===")

+    target_text = "<box>200 300 400 500</box>"

+    messages = [

+        {

+            "role": "user",

+            "content": [

+                {"type": "image"},

+                {"type": "text", "text": f"Find the UI element: {instruction}"}

+            ]

+        },

+        {

+            "role": "assistant",

+            "content": target_text

+        }

+    ]

+    text = processor.apply_chat_template(messages, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=False)

+    prompt_messages = [messages[0]]

+    prompt_text = processor.apply_chat_template(prompt_messages, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)

+    

+    inputs = processor(text=[text], images=[image], padding=False, return_tensors="pt")

+    prompt_inputs = processor(text=[prompt_text], images=[image], padding=False, return_tensors="pt")

+    

+    print("Prompt len:", prompt_inputs["input_ids"].shape[1])

+    print("Full len:", inputs["input_ids"].shape[1])

+    

+    print("Decoded prompt end:", processor.decode(prompt_inputs["input_ids"][0][-5:]))

+    print("Decoded full end:", processor.decode(inputs["input_ids"][0][prompt_inputs["input_ids"].shape[1]:]))

+

+if __name__ == "__main__":

+    main()
